expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the case focus is stated explicitly ("Case focus: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios") and the Phase 4b contract requirements quoted explicitly cover both: (1) canonical top-layer taxonomy list and (2) "Preserve scenario granularity (anti-compression)" with notes like "do not merge distinct Workstation-only vs Library-gap scenarios".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly identifies "Primary phase/checkpoint under test: phase4b" and frames the evaluation around Phase 4b by quoting "From skill_snapshot/references/phase4b-contract.md, Phase 4b must:" followed by Phase 4b-specific requirements and artifacts (e.g., required output `drafts/qa_plan_phase4b_r<round>.md`).
